repository.localMainMessage: Move nested audit and blog pipeline outputs into repo root

evidence: Production HTML response includes Sentry baggage: sentry-release=902d1d49988513a5d6c7085dce0c293385955d6e (matches local main HEAD).

digitalOceanAppSpec.source: Repo file .do/app-nursenest-core-next.yaml documents github repo erikagodin6-jpg/nursenest-core, branch main, deploy_on_push true, source_dir nursenest-core.
digitalOceanAppSpec.note: Confirm in DigitalOcean UI that the live app uses this spec (or equivalent): wrong source_dir (repo root vs nursenest-core) causes wrong build.

deployment.staleBuildNotes: Cannot read DO build logs or GitHub Actions from this environment. If release ever mismatches Sentry release in page HTML, redeploy from main.

requiredForNextApp: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL or equivalent for Stripe return URLs
environmentVariables.verifyIn: DigitalOcean App Platform → Settings → App-Level Environment Variables (and encrypted secrets).

cdnPurge.note: DigitalOcean Spaces CDN / any front cache: purge after hotfixes if HTML/assets appear stale. Not invoked from this repo.

nextJs.marketingPathwayLessons: src/app/(marketing)/.../lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx exports dynamic=force-dynamic (SSR); revalidate=86400 is subordinate to force-dynamic for caching behavior.
nextJs.blogCronRevalidation: src/app/api/cron/blog-batch-schedule/route.ts calls revalidatePath for /blog and sitemaps after publish.

cache.paywallNotes: Subscriber lesson APIs (e.g. /api/lessons) require auth (401 without session). Public marketing lesson pages use pathway-lesson-access + preview/locked UI; verify periodically that API routes never return full rationales to anonymous callers (existing server guards).

anonymousSpotChecks: GET https://www.nursenest.ca/us/rn/nclex-rn/lessons → 200; page content includes preview/locked/subscribe style gating language.
GET https://www.nursenest.ca/us/rn/nclex-rn/lessons/fundamentals-of-nursing-1 → 200; HTML contains many preview/Unlock tokens (marketing preview surface).
limitations: FREE vs PAID session flows require authenticated test accounts in production — not executed here.
Full guarantee that zero rationale text appears in HTML for anonymous users should be spot-checked on multiple pathways and in Network tab for API responses.

checks: Public lessons hub and a sample lesson detail URL return HTTP 200.
Large HTML payloads indicate SSR content (not blank).
notVerifiedHere: Rationale visibility only after entitlement on question bank routes

checks: GET https://www.nursenest.ca/blog → 200; title/meta present in HTML.
GET https://www.nursenest.ca/sitemaps/blog.xml → 200 with many blog post loc entries

stripe.note: Live checkout, cancel, and failed-payment flows require Stripe test/live keys and controlled test accounts. instrumentation.ts warns if NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL is unset (checkout URLs may default to localhost) — confirm in production env.

checks: Sample path https://www.nursenest.ca/us/rn/nclex-rn/cat returned HTTP 200 in curl probe (CAT surface reachable).
notVerifiedHere: Full exam session: question payload, progress persistence, completion screen

errorsAnd404.note: No sitewide link crawl in this pass. Health endpoint and primary marketing URLs respond 200.

performance.note: Marketing pages are large HTML; lesson listing uses pagination patterns in app code — no OOM detected in curl smoke tests.

remainingRisks: Stripe and subscription lifecycle not exercised in this validation run.
DigitalOcean build logs and exact deployed commit (outside Sentry HTML) not independently fetched.
app.nursenest.ca did not resolve from this environment (may be unset or different hostname); confirm learner app URL in DNS and env.
E2E paywall testing for rationales should include authenticated API inspection, not only HTML grep.
